title: StructuredEnvelope
description: Wrapper shape attached to every cuneiform-mcp tool's structuredContent. Concrete tool schemas reference this for the common fields (schema, provenance, warnings) and define their own `data` payload.

schema.description: Stable URI identifying which tool-specific schema this envelope conforms to.

data.description: Tool-specific payload. Shape defined by the schema referenced in `schema`.

warnings.description: Truncations, fallback-path notices, partial-result warnings. Absent or empty when the response is complete and authoritative.

source.description: Upstream system that owns this data. `local` for results derived from cached corpus indexes.

endpoint.description: Exact URL fetched, or `local:<index-name>` for cache-derived data. Should be reproducible by an external client.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the upstream fetch (or local read).

mcp_version.description: cuneiform-mcp version that produced the response.

citation.description: Optional human-readable citation hint (DOI, permalink, textual reference). Used by `lookup_sign`/`get_oracc_text`/etc when the upstream record has a published edition.

MuseumNumber.description: eBL's three-component museum number. Suffix is an empty string when absent. Render as `prefix.number[.suffix]`.
